patterns: What does the academic portal do?
responses: This is an AI-Based Academic Portal designed for students to view results, subjects, and manage their academic journey with AI assistance.
The portal helps students and admins manage academic data efficiently using advanced prediction and chat features.

patterns: How can I check my marks?
Where can I see my grades?
How to view my semester result?
responses: Go to your dashboard and select your semester to view marks and grades.
Click on your program and semester card to view your results and percentage instantly.
If you forgot your password, please use the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page to reset it via email.
Ensure your credentials are correct. If the issue persists, contact the admin office.

patterns: What am I studying this semester?
responses: You can find your registered subjects in the 'Courses' or 'Semester Details' section of your student dashboard.
The dashboard displays all subjects for your current semester along with credit hours.
Admins can edit student data and marks through the Admin Panel using their secure credentials.
If you are an admin, log in and navigate to 'Manage Students' or 'Manage Marks' to update records.
Take a short break, drink some water, and come back stronger — you’ve got this! 💪
Don’t give up, you’re doing great. Every small step counts!
Remember why you started. Success takes effort, and I'm here to support you.

patterns: What AI features are in this portal?
responses: This portal uses AI for chat assistance, result prediction, and automated academic warnings.
AI helps analyze student performance data and provides guidance through this very chatbot.
I am the AI Assistant for the AI Academic Portal, created to help you manage your studies.
I'm your virtual academic counselor. You can call me the Portal Assistant!
